response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows or direct exposure to capital markets/fixed income domains, which are mandatory requirements; their career is centered on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile systems with no evidence of financial systems development or SQL Server/Oracle expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated contributions to open-source and dev-ops infrastructure
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No verified C++ experience on Windows platform
No exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains
SQL experience listed but no context for SQL Server/Oracle in financial systems
